title: T-031 — API: Variance tracking nightly job (catch-weight)
prompt: Per §8.5 implement nightly job `catchWeightVariance` in lib/cron/catch-weight-variance.ts. For each item with weight_mode='catch': compute avg actual vs nominal, stddev, per-WO roll-up. Read source: work_order_items.actual_weight (08-PRODUCTION — assume read-only join). Write summary into a small cache table or materialized view `catch_weight_variance_daily`. Alert publish on outbox when avg variance > threshold from reference_tables.alert_thresholds.row_key='catch_weight_variance_pct'. RED tests/wiring/catch-weight-variance.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/wiring/catch-weight-variance.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Nightly variance computation job; emits alert when avg variance exceeds threshold.
pipeline_inputs.details: Provide a migration creating catch_weight_variance_daily table with (org_id, item_id, day, avg_variance_pct, stddev, samples). Tests stub work_order_items rows. Alert outbox event 'catch_weight.alert'.
acceptance_criteria: Given 100 weighings with avg variance 4%, threshold 5%, when job runs, then no alert emitted.
Given avg variance 7%, when job runs, then 'catch_weight.alert' present in outbox with item_id+avg.
Given fixed-weight items, when job runs, then they are skipped (no rows produced).
Given empty work_order_items, when job runs, then no errors (graceful no-op).
test_strategy: RED tests for threshold behaviour + skip rules.
